meta.note: Per-occupation education ROI from College Scorecard (bachelor's programs), joined by the NCES CIP2020->SOC2018 crosswalk. earn1yr/debt are medians across feeder majors; schools are the most selective institutions offering them, ranked by reported admission rate over the full pool.
